envelope.style: cinematic brand film — Apple-keynote restraint, near-black field, light as subject
envelope.font: Inter (400/500, self-hosted woff2) + generous tracking small-caps labels

brief: One Glance, One Truth — brand film #4 for NotchControls. A pure-black island pill floats in a charcoal void, rendered visible only by a hairline rim light. The film tells the brand's color vocabulary as a story of light: orange blooms (someone needs you), snaps to red (the room can't hear you), three green dots cascade (agents done), then all three colors converge in one explosive light-whip around the pill, hard-cutting to the end lockup. 3D perspective parallax layers + layered blurred glow duplicates carry the depth; deterministic film grain and vignette keep it cinematic. Slow confident pacing, ONE explosive moment at 9.5–11.5s.

scenes.motion: svg-path-draw hairline traces pill silhouette; small-caps label fade_blur
scenes.copy: YOUR MAC HAS A DARK CORNER

scenes.motion: left dot ignites; layered radial glow blooms + floor light pool; lateral camera drift begins (parallax)
snap crossfade orange→red glow stacks; live waveform under island flatlines (scaleY collapse)
scenes.copy: red — the room can't hear you

scenes.motion: three dots cascade alight L→R, ripple ring + seeded rising motes per dot; green light pools
three color orbs arc-converge into the pill; conic light-streak whips around it accelerating; white bloom rises to the cut

riser-tail-2p5.note: peak trimmed to land exactly on the 11.5 cut

scenes.motion: hard cut; pill centered w/ rim; wordmark tracking animates wide→tight; principle line fade_blur; GitHub line; 1s clean hold
scenes.copy: NotchControls / One glance. One truth. / FREE ON GITHUB

dominant_motif: color as light blooming from a pure-black island
pattern_interrupt: the 9.5s convergence whip after 9.5s of slow drift
